name: Fantomon

signature_move.name: Soul Chopper
signature_move.description: Cuts even the opponent's soul to pieces with its gigantic sickle and chain.

description: A Reaper -like Digimon holding a gigantic sickle and chain . It is a higher class of Ghost Digimon compared to Bakemon , so when a person is possessed by Fantomon they are in their last moments, and it comes upon them when they die completely. There is a crystal shaped like an eyeball hanging from its neck, and similar to Mammon 's crest, it is able to foresee everything with its power of clairvoyance, in order to perceive those that are close to death. It is said that the interior of the cloth which conceals its body leads to a separate dimension from the Digital World, and its Special Move is cutting even the opponent's soul to pieces with its gigantic sickle and chain ( Soul Chopper ). Those who suffer this technique have their souls completely annihilated.
